name: veloacademy
description: VeloAcademy — dev local: terminal 1 "npm run api" (API :3001), terminal 2 "npm run dev" (front :3000); abrir http://localhost:3000 (interface em pt-BR)

scripts.test:syntax: node -c lib/load-fonte-env.cjs && node -c lib/google-client-inject.cjs && node -c lib/mongodb.js && node -c lib/recent-temas.js && node -c lib/youtube-tutorias-playlist.js && node -c lib/cursos-conteudo-lookup.js && node -c lib/modulo-certificados.js && node -c lib/tema-visual-certificado.js && node -c lib/conquistas-excelencia.js && node -c lib/quiz-register-result.js && node -c lib/quiz-content.js && node -c lib/conquistas-quiz-approved.js && node -c lib/conquistas-badges.js && node -c lib/conquistas-badge-image-proxy.js && node -c api/progress/save.js && node -c api/progress/unlock-quiz.js && node -c api/quiz/start.js && node -c api/quiz/submit.js && node -c api/conquistas/quiz-approved.js && node -c "api/conquistas/temas/[userEmail].js" && node -c "api/conquistas/modulos/[userEmail].js" && node -c "api/conquistas/excelencia/[userEmail].js" && node -c api/temas/recent.js && node -c api/youtube/tutorias.js && node -c api/health.js && echo '✅ Sintaxe válida!'

author: VeloHub Development Team
